## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Change Type

- [ ] Major change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation or operations only

## Versioning

- Current version:
- New version, if this PR releases one:
- Changelog updated: Yes / No

## Safety Checks

- [ ] No `.env` values or private server files are included.
- [ ] Database migrations are safe for production.
- [ ] Queue workers or scheduled jobs were considered.
- [ ] Tests or manual checks were run.
